CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's intensity of worst pain experienced in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
 1=Mild
 2=Moderate
 3=Severe
 4=Very severe, horrible
 9=Unable to answer
343 J0700_STF_CNDCT_PAIN_ASMT_CD J0700_STF_CNDCT_PAIN_ASMT_CD J0700 Staff Conduct Pain Assessment Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether staff should perform a pain assessment. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
344 J0800A_NVRBL_SND_CD
